items.title: Application Protocols Reference
items.description: SSH, SMTP, FTP, MQTT, AMQP, LDAP, NTP and other essential application-layer protocols — how they work and when to use them.

items.title: OSI & TCP/IP Models
items.description: The OSI 7-layer model and TCP/IP 4-layer model — each layer's role, protocols, and how data encapsulation works end-to-end.
